chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1489 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.8834/2018 (C/A) 21.03.2023 Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Javed Ahmed Channa, Assistant Education Officer (Primary), Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. In compliance of order dated 01.02.2023, District Education Officer (Primary), Sukkur/respondent No.3 submits compliance report, which reflects that the father of the petitioner was expired on 05.07.1992 and the Government of Sindh, Services, General Administration & Coordination Department (Regulation Wing), Karachi, under Notification No. SORI(SGA&CD)2-3/02 dated 17th July 2009, has fixed the cut-off date i.e. 17th July 2007 for considering the cases of deceased quota; hence, petitioner is not entitled for the appointment under deceased quota policy. The compliance report is taken on record. The listed application stands disposed of in view of compliance report. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
